summary: Verified all inventory system refactor features. All 7 backend tests passed (100%). All 7 frontend features verified via Playwright UI testing.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ ITEM_CATEGORIES array has exactly 13 categories (no General/Tools): Glove Left, Glove Right, USB Hub, IMUs, Head Camera, L-Shaped Wire, Wrist Camera, Laptop, Laptop Charger, Power Bank, SSD, Bluetooth Adapter, HDD
✓ UNIQUE_CATEGORIES correctly defined: glove_left, glove_right, head_camera, wrist_camera, laptop, power_bank, ssd, hdd
✓ NON_UNIQUE_CATEGORIES correctly defined: usb_hub, imu, l_shaped_wire, laptop_charger, bluetooth_adapter
✓ Transfer dialog shows two-step flow: Step 1 (Category) → Step 2 (Item ID for UNIQUE, Item + Quantity for NON-UNIQUE)
✓ POST /api/events captures user_id (as 'user' field) and user_name for accountability
✓ Movement Log displays 'Moved by [User Name]' prominently for each transfer
✓ Dashboard shows 'Data Offload' nav item with link to /offload (admin only)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory refactor fully verified. Key verification points: 1) Add Item dialog shows 13 categories without General/Tools, 2) Transfer Item dialog has two-step flow with conditional rendering based on UNIQUE vs NON-UNIQUE categories, 3) Movement Log shows 'Moved by [User Name]' for each transfer, 4) Dashboard has Data Offload button for admin users.
passed_tests: Frontend: Add Item dialog has all 13 categories - VERIFIED
Frontend: No 'General' or 'Tools' categories in dropdown - VERIFIED
Frontend: Transfer dialog shows 'Step 1: Select Category' label - VERIFIED
Frontend: UNIQUE category (SSD) shows 'Step 2: Select Item ID' dropdown - VERIFIED
Frontend: NON-UNIQUE category (IMUs) shows 'Step 2: Select Item' + Quantity input - VERIFIED
Frontend: Movement Log shows 'Moved by [User Name]' for transfers - VERIFIED
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Data Offload' nav item with /offload link - VERIFIED
features_verified: Add Item dialog has all 13 specific categories (Glove Left, Glove Right, USB Hub, IMUs, Head Camera, L-Shaped Wire, Wrist Camera, Laptop, Laptop Charger, Power Bank, SSD, Bluetooth Adapter, HDD)
Add Item dialog does NOT have 'General' or 'Tools' categories
Transfer Item dialog shows two-step flow: Step 1 Category selection, Step 2 Item selection
UNIQUE categories (SSD, HDD, Glove Left/Right, Head Camera, Wrist Camera, Laptop, Power Bank) show Item ID dropdown in Step 2
NON-UNIQUE categories (USB Hub, IMUs, L-Shaped Wire, Laptop Charger, Bluetooth Adapter) show Item dropdown + Quantity input in Step 2
Movement Log displays 'Moved by [User Name]' prominently for each transfer entry
Dashboard shows 'Data Offload' button with link to /offload page (admin only)
POST /api/events endpoint captures user_id and user_name for accountability tracking
